hero.tagline:
Heirloom-quality beds, handcrafted from the finest woods.
Designed to outlast generations.

contact.address: Unit 2, 3 Siding Ln, Glasgow G5 0DZ, UK

footer.brand_desc: Where the silence of ancient forests becomes the furniture of your dreams. Every Grace Bed is built by hand, built to last, built to be inherited.
footer.tagline: Crafted with precision. Built to last.

about.tagline: A decade of sawdust, polish, and the quiet pride of craftsmanship.
about.story_para1: Grace Bed began in 2015 in a small workshop on the outskirts of Glasgow. Our founder, a third-generation carpenter, believed that Scotland's craftsmen had the skill to produce beds worthy of the world's most discerning homes — they just needed someone willing to set the standard.
about.story_para2: Ten years later, every Grace Bed is still built by hand. We have grown our team, expanded our wood selection, and added new techniques — but the fundamental truth of our business has never changed: we will not use a single piece of material we would be ashamed of.
about.story_para3: Every joint is mortised. Every surface is hand-finished. Every bed is inspected for four hours before it leaves our doors. This is not a production line. It is a craft tradition.
about.quote_text: My grandfather built furniture that is still in use today. That is the only standard I know.
